post_text:
📌 FinOps for AI Systems

Most teams think AI cost optimization is just a matter of tweaking a finance dashboard — I think that's a recipe for disaster 🚨.
—
What actually works is treating it as a product architecture problem, where every request is routed to a fit-for-purpose model tier, and every possible optimization is built into the system from the ground up 📈.

```
Route -> Cache -> Batch -> Fallback -> Govern
```
This flow ensures that each request is sent to the right model tier, responses are reused where safe, offline workloads are aggregated for cheaper throughput, and the system degrades gracefully before expensive retries 📊.
—
You can either focus on short-term cost savings or build a system that balances cost and quality — I know which one I'd choose 🤔.
💬 What's your top priority for controlling AI cost:
 Route, Cache, Batch, Fallback, or Govern?
#AICostOptimization #ProductArchitecture #AIEngineering #CostControl #MachineLearning
